name: Dodger Stadium
address: 1000 Vin Scully Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90012
parkingInfo: On-site parking available for $30-$50; lots open 2 hours before first pitch.
transitInfo: Dodger Stadium Express shuttle from Union Station (free with game ticket); Metro B/D Line to Union Station.

name: SoFi Stadium
parkingInfo: Prepaid parking $60-$100 at Hollywood Park; rideshare drop-off on Prairie Ave.
transitInfo: Metro C Line to Downtown Inglewood station, then shuttle to stadium on game days.

name: Crypto.com Arena
address: 1111 S Figueroa St, Los Angeles, CA 90015
parkingInfo: Multiple lots surrounding LA Live; expect $20-$40. Book via ParkWhiz for discounts.
transitInfo: Metro A/E Line to Pico station (one block away); Metro B/D to 7th/Metro then walk 10 min.

name: BMO Stadium
address: 3939 S Figueroa St, Los Angeles, CA 90037
parkingInfo: Limited on-site parking $40; street parking and private lots available on Figueroa.
transitInfo: Metro E Line to Expo/Vermont station then walk 15 min; DASH bus F from downtown.

name: Dignity Health Sports Park
parkingInfo: Free general parking in surrounding lots; VIP/premium parking $25.
transitInfo: Metro C Line to Avalon station, then bus 246 southbound to Victoria St; limited transit access.

name: Intuit Dome
parkingInfo: Prepaid parking required ($30-$60); adjacent structures and rideshare plaza available.
transitInfo: Metro C Line to Downtown Inglewood station, then shuttle or 15-min walk via Century Blvd.

name: Los Angeles Memorial Coliseum
address: 3911 S Figueroa St, Los Angeles, CA 90037
parkingInfo: Lots around Exposition Park $20-$40; arrive early as lots fill quickly on game days.
transitInfo: Metro E Line to Expo Park/USC station (adjacent); multiple Metro bus lines serve Figueroa.

name: Rose Bowl Stadium
parkingInfo: On-site parking $25-$50; free remote lots with shuttle service on major event days.
transitInfo: Metro A Line to Memorial Park station, then Pasadena Transit or shuttle to Rose Bowl.

name: Pauley Pavilion
parkingInfo: UCLA campus parking structures $15-$20; Lot 4 closest to venue.
transitInfo: Metro B/D Line to Westwood/UCLA station; Big Blue Bus lines 1, 2, 8 to Westwood Blvd.

name: Galen Center
address: 3400 S Figueroa St, Los Angeles, CA 90089
parkingInfo: USC parking structures on Jefferson Blvd ($15-$20); street metered parking on Figueroa.
transitInfo: Metro E Line to Expo Park/USC station, walk 5 min north; DASH F bus from downtown.

name: Firestone Fieldhouse
parkingInfo: Free parking in campus lots; overflow parking along PCH on busy nights.
transitInfo: Limited transit; Metro 534 bus along PCH from Santa Monica. Driving recommended.

name: Gersten Pavilion
parkingInfo: Free campus parking on game days in Lots H and F; enter from Lincoln Blvd.
transitInfo: Metro Bus 115 along Lincoln Blvd, or Culver City Bus 1 to LMU campus.

name: The Matadome (Premier America Credit Union Arena)
parkingInfo: CSUN parking structures B5 and G3 ($10); free street parking on Zelzah Ave after 6 PM.
transitInfo: Metro G Line (Orange) to Nordhoff station, then CSUN shuttle or 15-min walk east.

name: Walter Pyramid
address: 6300 State University Dr, Long Beach, CA 90815
parkingInfo: Campus parking lots $10 on event days; Lot G12 closest to Pyramid.
transitInfo: Metro A Line to Downtown Long Beach, then Long Beach Transit 91/93 to campus.

name: ELAC Weingart Stadium
address: 1301 Avenida Cesar Chavez, Monterey Park, CA 91754
parkingInfo: Free parking in campus lots; additional overflow parking on Collegian Ave.
transitInfo: Metro B/D Line to Union Station, then Metro 70 bus eastbound to Atlantic/Cesar Chavez.

name: LACC Athletic Field & Gym
address: 855 N Vermont Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90029
parkingInfo: Free campus parking in Lot C off Monroe St; metered street parking on Vermont.
transitInfo: Metro B Line to Vermont/Santa Monica station (2 blocks); Metro buses 204, 754 on Vermont.

name: LAVC Monarch Gym & Athletic Fields
parkingInfo: Free campus parking in Lot 1 off Fulton Ave; street parking available on Burbank Blvd.
transitInfo: Metro G Line (Orange) to Laurel Canyon station, then walk or bus south on Laurel Canyon Blvd.

name: El Camino College Murdock Stadium
parkingInfo: Free parking in campus lots off Crenshaw Blvd and Manhattan Beach Blvd.
transitInfo: Metro Bus 210 along Crenshaw Blvd; South Bay Shuttle from Metro C Line Crenshaw station.

name: SMC Corsair Field & Pavilion
parkingInfo: Free campus parking in lots on Pico Blvd; metered street parking on Pearl St.
transitInfo: Metro E Line to 17th St/SMC station (adjacent); Big Blue Bus lines 7 and Rapid 7.

name: Mt. SAC Hilmer Lodge Stadium
parkingInfo: Free parking in campus lots off Grand Ave and Temple Ave.
transitInfo: Foothill Transit Line 286 to Mt. SAC campus; limited transit, driving recommended.

name: Cerritos College Falcon Stadium
parkingInfo: Free parking in campus lots off Studebaker Rd and Alondra Blvd.
transitInfo: Metro Bus 460 on Norwalk Blvd; Norwalk Transit line 7 along Alondra Blvd.

name: PCC Robinson Stadium & Hutto-Patterson Gymnasium
parkingInfo: Free campus parking off Hill Ave; street parking on Colorado Blvd.
transitInfo: Metro A Line to Lake station, then Pasadena Transit 10 to campus.

name: Cal Poly Pomona Kellogg Gym
parkingInfo: Campus parking $5-$10; Lot F closest to athletics complex.
transitInfo: Foothill Transit 194/291 to campus; Metrolink to Pomona station, then Foothill Transit.
